nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Isolated showers and thunderstorms before 5am, then scattered showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 77. East wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Scattered showers and thunderstorms before 9am, then scattered showers and thunderstorms between 9am and 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 86. East wind 8 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.detailedForecast: Isolated showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 1am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 77. East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
